_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Monitor operational status and effectiveness of the processing, exploitation and dissemination architecture.
reference_document_element_description: Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, scope change management, and executive status reporting.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.555), DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.526).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.316). Shared vocabulary: [status]. DCWF-only terms [architecture, dissemination, effectiveness, exploitation, monitor, operational] vs WIDAI-only terms [change, coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.883, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 15-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.2%). "Monitor operational status and effectiveness of the processing, exploitation and" and "Manage program execution, including workstream coordination, issue resolution, s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.565 > STS 0.316 (gap +0.248). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [status] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [status]. DCWF-only: [architecture, dissemination, effectiveness, exploitation, monitor, operational]. WIDAI-only: [change, coordination, execution, executive, issue, manage].

signals.detail: STS 0.316 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.248 with low STS 0.316. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
